TimeoutLazyT Constructor

One Identity Manager API Server
Creates a new lazy value with a timeout.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Util
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public TimeoutLazy(
	Func<T> valueFactory,
	TimeSpan timeout,
	LazyThreadSafetyMode mode = LazyThreadSafetyMode.ExecutionAndPublication,
	bool disposeOnInvalidate = false
)

Parameters

valueFactory
Type: SystemFuncT
The value factory function that is called to retrieve the value.
timeout
Type: SystemTimeSpan
Validity duration for the value
mode (Optional)
Type: System.ThreadingLazyThreadSafetyMode
Thread safety mode.
disposeOnInvalidate (Optional)
Type: SystemBoolean
Dispose the value when resetting.
